browsers.title: Web Browsers
browsers.subtitle: Browse the internet with your favorite browser.

apps.name: Mozilla Firefox
apps.description: A fast, reliable and private web browser from the non-profit Mozilla organization.

extraOptions.title: GNOME Theme
extraOptions.subtitle: Make Firefox look like a GNOME-native app thanks to the Firefox GNOME theme by rafaelmardojai

extraOptions.title: Native Wayland Rendering
extraOptions.subtitle: Launches Firefox with MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND=1 for proper scaling and input handling

extraOptions.title: Privacy Hardening
extraOptions.subtitle: Applies a user.js based on arkenfox to disable telemetry and harden fingerprinting resistance

apps.name: LibreWolf
apps.description: A Firefox fork focused on privacy, security, and freedom — ships hardened by default.

extraOptions.title: GNOME Theme
extraOptions.subtitle: Apply the Firefox GNOME theme for a native-feeling look

apps.name: Zen Browser
apps.description: Experience tranquility while browsing the internet with Zen.

extraOptions.title: Native Wayland Rendering
extraOptions.subtitle: Launches Zen with MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND=1 for proper scaling and input handling

apps.name: Helium Browser
apps.description: The Chromium-based web browser made for people, with love.

apps.name: Ungoogled Chromium
apps.description: Chromium stripped of all Google integration and telemetry.

extraOptions.title: Native Wayland Rendering
extraOptions.subtitle: Launches Chromium with Ozone/Wayland flags for crisp rendering and proper scaling

apps.name: Brave
apps.description: Chromium-based browser focused on privacy with built-in ad blocking.

extraOptions.title: Native Wayland Rendering
extraOptions.subtitle: Launches Brave with Ozone/Wayland flags for crisp rendering and proper scaling

apps.name: GNOME Web
apps.description: The GNOME-native browser. Clean, fast, and deeply integrated with the desktop.

apps.name: Tor Browser
apps.description: Browse the internet anonymously and bypass censorship via the Tor network.

gaming.title: Gaming
gaming.subtitle: Game launchers, emulators, and gaming tools.

apps.name: Steam
apps.description: Steam is the ultimate destination for playing, discussing, and creating games.

extraOptions.title: GE-Proton
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs ProtonUp-Qt for managing custom Proton-GE builds with better game compatibility

extraOptions.title: GameMode
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Feral GameMode to automatically optimize system performance while gaming

extraOptions.title: MangoHud
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs MangoHud for an in-game overlay showing FPS, temps, and GPU/CPU stats

apps.name: Heroic Games Launcher
apps.description: Free and open source Epic, GOG, and Amazon Prime Games launcher.

extraOptions.title: GameMode
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Feral GameMode to automatically optimize system performance while gaming

extraOptions.title: MangoHud
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs MangoHud for an in-game overlay showing FPS, temps, and GPU/CPU stats

apps.name: Lutris
apps.description: Open gaming platform for Linux. Manages Wine, emulators, and native games in one place.

extraOptions.title: Wine
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Wine for running Windows games and apps not covered by Proton

extraOptions.title: GameMode
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Feral GameMode to automatically optimize system performance while gaming

apps.name: Bottles
apps.description: Run Windows software and games on Linux easily with preconfigured Wine environments.

extraOptions.title: GameMode
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Feral GameMode for automatic performance optimization in Bottles environments

apps.name: Prism Launcher
apps.description: Open-source Minecraft launcher with support for multiple instances, accounts, and mods.

extraOptions.title: MangoHud
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs MangoHud for an FPS and performance overlay while playing Minecraft

apps.name: RetroArch
apps.description: The all-in-one emulator frontend. Runs cores for hundreds of retro consoles and systems.

extraOptions.title: Common Cores Bundle
extraOptions.subtitle: Pre-installs cores for SNES, GBA, NES, PS1, N64, and Sega systems

apps.name: Visual Studio Code
apps.description: Visual Studio Code is a free and open-source(ish) code editor developed by Microsoft.

extraOptions.title: Native Wayland Rendering
extraOptions.subtitle: Launches VSCode with Ozone/Wayland flags for crisp rendering and proper scaling

extraOptions.title: Vim Keybindings
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs VSCodeVim for modal editing

extraOptions.title: Python Extension Pack
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the Microsoft Python extension with Pylance and debugger

extraOptions.title: Rust Extension Pack
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs rust-analyzer and Even Better TOML

extraOptions.title: C/C++ Extension Pack
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the Microsoft C/C++ extension with IntelliSense

extraOptions.title: Nix Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs nix-ide and pairs it with nil or nixd as the language server

extraOptions.title: Web Extension Pack
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs ESLint, Prettier, CSS/HTML tools, and Tailwind IntelliSense

extraOptions.title: Svelte Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the official Svelte for VS Code extension

extraOptions.title: GitLens
extraOptions.subtitle: Supercharged Git tooling — blame, history, and more inline

extraOptions.title: Remote SSH
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Microsoft's Remote SSH extension for editing on remote machines (proprietary)

extraOptions.title: Docker / Compose Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the Docker extension for managing containers and images

apps.name: Zed
apps.description: Zed is a minimal code editor crafted for speed and collaboration with humans.

extraOptions.title: Vim Mode
extraOptions.subtitle: Enables Zed's built-in modal editing mode

extraOptions.title: Python Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs pyright and the Zed Python extension

extraOptions.title: Rust Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs rust-analyzer for Rust language intelligence

extraOptions.title: C/C++ Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs clangd for C and C++ language intelligence

extraOptions.title: Nix Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs nil as the Nix language server alongside the Zed Nix extension

extraOptions.title: Web Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs language servers for TypeScript, HTML, CSS, and JSON

extraOptions.title: Svelte Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the Zed Svelte extension with svelte-language-server

extraOptions.title: Zed Collaboration
extraOptions.subtitle: Enables real-time multiplayer editing via zed.dev (requires account)

apps.name: GNOME Builder
apps.description: The integrated development environment for the GNOME desktop.

extraOptions.title: Python Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the Python language server for GNOME Builder

extraOptions.title: Rust Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs rust-analyzer for Rust language intelligence

extraOptions.title: C/C++ Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs clangd for C and C++ language intelligence

extraOptions.title: TypeScript / JavaScript Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the TypeScript language server

extraOptions.title: Vala Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the Vala language server (great for GNOME app development)

extraOptions.title: Go Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs gopls, the official Go language server

extraOptions.title: Java Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Eclipse JDT language server for Java

extraOptions.title: Zig Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs ZLS, the Zig language server

extraOptions.title: Lua Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs lua-language-server

extraOptions.title: Shell / Bash Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs bash-language-server for shell script editing

extraOptions.title: Web Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs language servers for HTML, CSS, and JSON

extraOptions.title: Flatpak Build Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs flatpak-builder for building and testing Flatpak apps

extraOptions.title: Haskell Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs haskell-language-server

extraOptions.title: Vim-Like Behavior
extraOptions.subtitle: Sets the default keyboard flavor to Vim

apps.name: Neovim
apps.description: Hyperextensible Vim-based text editor built for the terminal.

extraOptions.title: LazyVim Starter
extraOptions.subtitle: Bootstraps LazyVim as your Neovim config — batteries-included plugin setup

extraOptions.title: Nix LSP
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs nil as a Nix language server alongside nvim-lspconfig

extraOptions.title: Tree-sitter Parsers
extraOptions.subtitle: Pre-installs common tree-sitter grammars for syntax highlighting

extraOptions.title: System Clipboard Integration
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs wl-clipboard so Neovim can read and write the Wayland clipboard

apps.name: Helix
apps.description: A post-modern modal text editor with built-in LSP and tree-sitter support. No config needed.

extraOptions.title: Nix LSP
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs nil so Helix has Nix language intelligence out of the box

extraOptions.title: Rust LSP
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs rust-analyzer for Rust language intelligence

extraOptions.title: Python LSP
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs python-lsp-server for Python language intelligence

extraOptions.title: Web LSP Bundle
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs language servers for TypeScript, HTML, CSS, and JSON

apps.name: GitG
apps.description: GNOME's native Git repository viewer. Browse history, diffs, and branches with a clean UI.

apps.name: GitHub CLI
apps.description: GitHub on the command line. Manage PRs, issues, and repos without leaving your terminal.

extraOptions.title: GitHub Copilot in the CLI
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the gh-copilot extension for AI-assisted command suggestions in the terminal

apps.name: Docker
apps.description: Build, ship, and run containerized applications. Includes the Docker CLI and daemon.

extraOptions.title: Docker Compose
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs docker-compose for managing multi-container applications

extraOptions.title: LazyDocker
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the lazydocker TUI for managing containers and images interactively

apps.name: JetBrains Toolbox
apps.description: Manage and launch JetBrains IDEs (IntelliJ, CLion, PyCharm, etc.) from one place.

core-gnome.title: GNOME Core Apps
core-gnome.subtitle: Essential GNOME desktop utilities and tools.

apps.name: Files (Nautilus)
apps.description: The GNOME file manager. Browse and organize your files with ease.

apps.name: GNOME Console
apps.description: The simple, clean GNOME terminal. Minimal by design, integrates well with the desktop.

apps.name: GNOME System Monitor
apps.description: Monitor system resources and processes in a GNOME-native interface.

apps.name: Extension Manager
apps.description: Browse, install, and manage GNOME Shell extensions without a web browser.

apps.name: GNOME Tweaks
apps.description: Expose advanced GNOME settings not available in the standard Settings app.

core-generic.title: Core Utilities (Generic)
core-generic.subtitle: Essential system tools and shells for all desktops.

apps.name: Kitty
apps.description: Fast, feature-rich, GPU-accelerated terminal emulator. Highly scriptable and extensible.

extraOptions.title: Shell Integration
extraOptions.subtitle: Enables kitty's built-in Zsh/Bash shell integration for better prompt and history support

apps.name: btop++
apps.description: A beautiful, responsive resource monitor for CPU, memory, disk, network, and processes.

apps.name: Fish Shell
apps.description: The friendly interactive shell. Autosuggestions, syntax highlighting, and tab completion out of the box.

extraOptions.title: Fisher Plugin Manager
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Fisher for managing Fish plugins declaratively

apps.name: Zsh
apps.description: Extended Bourne shell with powerful completion, history, and plugin support.

extraOptions.title: Oh My Zsh
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Oh My Zsh as a plugin and theme framework for Zsh

extraOptions.title: Starship Prompt
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Starship for a fast, minimal, and informative shell prompt

utilities.title: Utilities
utilities.subtitle: Handy tools for productivity and system management.

apps.name: Flatseal
apps.description: Manage Flatpak permissions visually. Review and override app sandbox settings.

apps.name: Pika Backup
apps.description: Simple, GNOME-native backup tool powered by BorgBackup. Set it and forget it.

apps.name: Metadata Cleaner
apps.description: Strip metadata from images, PDFs, and documents before sharing them.

apps.name: Curtail
apps.description: Simple image compressor for PNG, JPEG, and WebP. Drag, drop, shrink.

apps.name: GNOME Boxes
apps.description: Manage virtual machines and remote desktops. Simple front-end for QEMU/KVM.

apps.name: Archive Manager
apps.description: GNOME's archive manager. Open, create, and extract zip, tar, 7z, and more.

apps.name: Impression
apps.description: Flash Linux ISOs to USB drives. Simple, fast, and GNOME-native.

apps.name: Decoder
apps.description: Scan and generate QR codes straight from the GNOME desktop.

apps.name: Resources
apps.description: A modern, GNOME-native system monitor. Monitor CPU, GPU, memory, network, and processes.

apps.name: Mission Center
apps.description: Monitor CPU, memory, disk, and network usage in a Task Manager-style interface.

office.title: Office & Productivity
office.subtitle: Office suites, note-taking, and document tools.

apps.name: LibreOffice
apps.description: The full-featured, free office suite. Covers documents, spreadsheets, presentations, and more.

extraOptions.title: Fresh Channel
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs LibreOffice Fresh (latest features) instead of the Still (stable LTS) channel

extraOptions.title: GNOME Integration
extraOptions.subtitle: Applies the LibreOffice GNOME theme and uses the GTK file picker

extraOptions.title: Microsoft-Compatible Fonts
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs Liberation fonts for better compatibility with .docx and .xlsx files

apps.name: ONLYOFFICE
apps.description: A polished office suite with excellent Microsoft Office format compatibility.

apps.name: Thunderbird
apps.description: Mozilla's free email and calendar client. Powerful, extensible, and privacy-respecting.

extraOptions.title: GNOME Theme
extraOptions.subtitle: Applies the Thunderbird GNOME theme for a more native-looking UI

apps.name: Obsidian
apps.description: A powerful knowledge base on top of a local folder of Markdown files.

extraOptions.title: Native Wayland Rendering
extraOptions.subtitle: Launches Obsidian with Ozone/Wayland flags for crisp rendering and proper scaling

apps.name: Apostrophe
apps.description: A distraction-free GNOME Markdown editor with live preview.

apps.name: Foliate
apps.description: A beautiful ebook reader for GNOME. Supports EPUB, Mobi, PDF, and more.

apps.name: Papers
apps.description: GNOME's document viewer (formerly Evince). View PDFs, PostScript, and more.

advanced.title: Advanced Tools
advanced.subtitle: Virtualization, security, and power user utilities.

apps.name: Virtual Machine Manager
apps.description: Desktop UI for managing QEMU/KVM virtual machines. Full control over VM configuration, snapshots, and networking.

extraOptions.title: UEFI / Secure Boot Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs OVMF to run VMs with UEFI firmware instead of legacy BIOS

extraOptions.title: VirtIO Windows Drivers
extraOptions.subtitle: Includes the VirtIO driver ISO for better performance in Windows guest VMs

apps.name: GNOME Boxes
apps.description: Simple VM and remote desktop manager. Great for quickly spinning up distros without complex configuration.

apps.name: Podman Desktop
apps.description: Manage containers and pods with a rootless, daemon-free alternative to Docker Desktop.

extraOptions.title: Compose Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs podman-compose for running docker-compose.yml files with Podman

extraOptions.title: Kubernetes / Kind
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs kubectl and kind for running local Kubernetes clusters inside containers

apps.name: Wireshark
apps.description: The world's leading network protocol analyzer. Capture and inspect network traffic at packet level.

extraOptions.title: Capture Without Root
extraOptions.subtitle: Adds your user to the wireshark group so you can capture packets without sudo

apps.name: GParted
apps.description: GNOME Partition Editor. Create, resize, move, and format disk partitions visually.

extraOptions.title: Extra Filesystem Support
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs tools for exFAT, NTFS, Btrfs, F2FS, and other filesystems

apps.name: KeePassXC
apps.description: Offline, encrypted password manager. Your vault stays local — no cloud, no accounts.

extraOptions.title: Browser Integration
extraOptions.subtitle: Installs the KeePassXC browser extension connector for autofill in Firefox and Chromium

extraOptions.title: Secret Service Integration
extraOptions.subtitle: Exposes KeePassXC as a libsecret provider so GNOME apps can use it as a keyring

apps.name: Bitwarden
apps.description: Open-source cloud password manager. Sync your vault across devices with end-to-end encryption.

extraOptions.title: Native Wayland Rendering
extraOptions.subtitle: Launches Bitwarden with Ozone/Wayland flags for crisp rendering and proper scaling

apps.name: Cockpit
apps.description: Web-based server admin panel. Monitor and manage your machine or home server from a browser.

extraOptions.title: VM Management
extraOptions.subtitle: Adds the Cockpit Machines plugin for managing QEMU/KVM VMs through the web UI

extraOptions.title: Podman Plugin
extraOptions.subtitle: Adds the Cockpit Podman plugin for managing containers through the web UI

apps.name: Ventoy
apps.description: Create a bootable USB drive that can hold multiple ISOs at once. Just copy and boot.

apps.name: Nmap + Zenmap
apps.description: Network scanner and security auditing tool. Zenmap provides a GUI frontend for Nmap.
